strategy: Round 1 Ivan summons three Pit Fiends that act from Round 2. Expect four incoming attacks per round after that.
He resists Fire 80% and takes +40% from Ice and Storm. Bring Ice or Storm.
Use the free Round 1 (minions inactive) to blade, then shield or heal through rounds 2-3 while you add a Feint.
Finish with one big Ice or Storm AoE so the Pit Fiends die with him.
cheatNotes: He opens by summoning three Pit Fiend minions; they sit out Round 1 and act from Round 2. Use that quiet round to start setup, and plan an AoE finish so they all die together.
